name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Can't you see I'm busy?

Despreat times call for desperate measures

.

(Bakugo's like 21 here)

.

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.

Hmmm, i think he'd be like the busy kind of man. I mean, paper work would annoy him, obviously. He'd think it's a waist of time, that a hero shouldn't be doing shit like that. But he'd to that anyway. He's a grown responsible man.

.

I didn't die! Sorry I was like offline for some time (over a week, I suppose?). I was out of town, summer vacation and stuff but I'm back now. Alive and well, ready to shower you with more bakubots.

And almost a 100 followers????!!!!!

Guys I'm sobbing here 😭 😭 😭

THANK YOU SO MUCH BABIES!!! I LOVE YALL

.

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.
